{{Quote|I am an explorer and a scientist. My profession as a mercenary enables me to travel the galaxy and explore caves on many planets.|Ahrnell, talking to Meetra Surik|<ref name="KOTOR II" />}}
'''Ahrnell''' was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] who worked as part of a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] group that had set up operations on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] following the [[Jedi Civil War]]. Unlike the other mercenaries on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]], however, he was a [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] and avid spelunker, using his job as a mercenary to explore other worlds. He explored the [[Crystal Cave (Dantooine)|crystal cave]] that was located near the ruins of the [[Jedi Enclave]], using [[Kinrath/Legends|kinrath]] scent glands to move past the creatures without disturbing them. When he encountered [[Meetra Surik]] inside the cave, he could tell that she was a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. For her part, Surik could sense that Ahrnell was somewhat Force-sensitive himself, because he could feel the energy of the [[Lightsaber crystal/Legends|lightsaber crystals]] within the cave. Ahrnell promised not to betray Surik's secret, however.

==Behind the scenes==
The Jedi Exile can convince Ahrnell to let her hold his kinrath gland for a moment, at which point she can give the gland back to him, kill him for the gland, or keep the gland to herself, leaving Ahrnell to be killed by kinrath.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
